title: We Praise You, O God, Our Redeemer, Creator

verses.text: We praise you, O God, our Redeemer, Creator; in grateful devotion our tribute we bring. We lay it before you, we kneel and adore you; we bless your holy name, glad praises we sing.

We worship you, God of our fathers, we bless you; through life's storm and tempest our guide you have been. When perils o'ertake us, escape you will make us, and with your help, O Lord, our battles we win.
With voices united our praises we offer, to you, great Jehovah, glad anthems we raise. Your strong arm will guide us, our God is beside us; to you, our great Redeemer, forever be praise.
